headline: The Ecosystem
subheadline: A growing collection of interconnected open-source projects spanning AI, web, and developer tools.

projects.name: Elixpo Art
projects.description: Creative platform with 15+ art styles and 8+ AI models for generating stunning images and video. Features gallery, social sharing, and blog system.

projects.name: LixSearch
projects.description: Advanced search engine with real-time web research, semantic caching, multi-turn memory, and source attribution using Playwright agents.

projects.name: Elixpo Chat
projects.description: Chat application with integrated daily news, AI-powered podcast generation, weather dashboard, and search functionality.

projects.name: LixSketch
projects.description: Open-source freemium platform for infinite canvas sketching with hand-drawn aesthetic. No login required, E2E encrypted sharing.

projects.name: Elixpo Blogs
projects.description: Full-featured blog platform with user authentication, image processing, QR codes, email notifications, and Redis caching.

projects.name: Jackey Bot
projects.description: Discord bot for AI image generation with slash commands. Supports /generate, /remix with multiple models, aspect ratios, and themes.

projects.name: Elixpo Accounts
projects.description: Enterprise SSO for the Elixpo ecosystem with WebAuthn passwordless auth, JWT, and Prometheus monitoring.

projects.name: Elixpo URL
projects.description: Fast URL shortener on Cloudflare edge. Instant redirects, click analytics, custom short codes, and expiring links.

projects.name: Elixpo Me
projects.description: Portfolio platform for Elixpo members. Each member gets a personalized route with homepage, projects, publications, and contact sections.

projects.name: Elixpo Verse
projects.description: Animated circular clock display with multi-timezone support, 3D cube animations, and flip-clock odometer display.

projects.name: Resume.me
projects.description: Personal resume and portfolio project for team members with individual customization.
